ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_type_id") REFERENCES project_types ("project_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_levels" (
  "review_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review level */,
  "review_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the review level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the review level */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the review level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being reviewed */,
  "review_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review level */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the review */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the review */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the review */,
  "complete" INTEGER /* Whether the review is complete */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_review_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_level_id") REFERENCES review_levels ("review_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_status" (
  "review_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review status */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_status_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "project_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project-user relationship was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project-user relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "project_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, assessment) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "review_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_timeline" (
  "project_timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project timeline */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone or task */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the milestone */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the timeline entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the timeline entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_timeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_timeline_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., review, deadline) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_checklist" (
  "review_checklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review checklist */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "task" TEXT /* Task to be completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the checklist entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the checklist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_checklist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_checklist_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_risk" (
  "project_risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project risk */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "risk" TEXT /* Description of the risk */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of the risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "mitigation_strategy" TEXT /* Mitigation strategy for the risk */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the risk was identified */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the risk was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_risk_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_issue" (
  "project_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_issue_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was modified */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
